upgrade.name: Atlas Signal Harvest lane minigame
upgrade.summary: Promoted the content and social growth lane from a generic checkpoint game into a custom Signal Harvest minigame with a generated signal-garden texture, animated blooms, vitality scoring, and lane-derived harvest beds.

research.query: game UI harvest garden node collection progress dashboard inspiration
research.takeaway: Harvest loops make progress feel resource-based when collectible nodes, growth state, and clear readiness verdicts are visible together.

research.query: social media analytics dashboard gamification signal garden UI inspiration
research.takeaway: Social-growth dashboards benefit from signal health, timing, and safety gates when they are scannable without exposing real account actions.

research.query: cozy strategy game resource harvesting UI progress nodes inspiration
research.takeaway: A calmer strategy-game texture helps distinguish this lane from forge, radar, and control-plane modules while keeping the dashboard premium.

imageGeneration.prompt: Premium dark game UI background for a Signal Harvest minigame about social/content growth, combining a luminous digital garden with social signal nodes, trend vines, small glowing analytics glyphs, and harvest-ready topic blooms. Wide landscape, dark center for UI overlays, amber/coral/teal glow, no text, no logos, no people, no social-media brand marks.

implementation: Copied the generated signal-garden background into web/assets/games/signal-harvest-bg-20260617.png.
Added the texture path to content_and_social_growth in web/data/lane-visuals.json.
Added signal-harvest dispatch to game routing and game step counts in web/app.js.
Added a lane-derived Signal Harvest model for topic bloom, proof compost, voice shield, trend window, and account gate beds.
Rendered an animated signal garden with bloom nodes, vitality verdict, bed cards, meters, and existing game controls.
Added responsive CSS for docked side-panel, stacked desktop, and mobile layouts.
Documented the custom renderer and generated texture in web/README.md.

commands: rg -n "[^\x00-\x7F]" web\index.html web\app.js web\styles.css web\README.md web\data\lane-visuals.json reports\agent-company-atlas-signal-harvest-trace-metadata-20260617.json
